task_completion.description: A track is available in the application workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A track item is visible in the layers, data, or tracks panel of the GIS/GPS application (since the default file lacks a track, the agent must have imported a new one or converted a route).

task_completion.description: The track is renamed to 'Official Survey Path'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Official Survey Path' is visible as the name of the track in the application's layers/data list or within a track properties dialog.

task_completion.description: Waypoints are excluded from the active selection or workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Waypoints are unchecked, hidden, or deleted in the layers/data panel, or the export dialog explicitly shows that only the track layer is selected for export.

task_completion.description: The export or save dialog is configured for KML format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is open with 'KML' (Keyhole Markup Language) selected in the 'Save as type' or format dropdown.

task_completion.description: The file is saved to the correct Documents path with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the directory as 'Documents' (C:\Users\Docker\Documents) and the file name as 'survey_path' or 'survey_path.kml' right before saving, or a file explorer window later confirms the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical GIS/GPS application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application (like Viking, QGIS, or similar) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The KML file is generated via the application's 'Save As' or 'Export' menus, not by running a custom Python/PowerShell script.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the KML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open Notepad or another text editor to manually write the XML/KML code to spoof the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target KML path: 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\survey_path.kml'. Target track name: 'Official Survey Path'. Note: The default imported file (fells_loop.gpx) contains only a route, no track points. The agent must have either manually imported a different track (e.g., dole_langres_track.gpx from the Desktop) or converted the existing route to a track in the GUI before renaming and exporting.
